cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: Dekorama cookie policy: types of cookies, consent management and how to manage or delete cookies on dekorama.es.
cookies.s1Body: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device (computer, tablet or mobile) when you visit them. They allow the site to remember your actions and preferences for a period of time, so you don't have to set them again on each visit.
cookies.s2Title: 2. Use of cookies on this site
cookies.s2Body: The Dekorama website may use technical cookies necessary for the proper functioning of the page (for example, to remember display preferences or to manage the session). Analysis cookies may also be used to understand how users interact with the site and improve the experience, provided you have been informed and, where applicable, have given your consent.
cookies.s3Title: 3. Types of cookies we may use
cookies.s3Item1: Technical cookies: Necessary for the site to function. They do not require consent.
cookies.s3Item2: Preference cookies: They allow the site to remember options chosen by the user (language, region, etc.).
cookies.s3Item3: Analysis cookies: They allow us to measure site usage (for example, with tools such as Google Analytics) to improve our content and services. They may require your consent under applicable regulations.
cookies.s4Title: 4. How to manage or delete cookies
cookies.s4Body: You can set your browser to reject cookies or to warn you when a site tries to install them. You can also delete cookies already stored from your browser options. Please note that blocking or deleting cookies may affect the proper functioning of some parts of the site.
cookies.s4Body2: Instructions for managing cookies can usually be found in the Help or Settings menu of each browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, etc.).
cookies.s5Body: By continuing to browse this website after being informed of this cookie policy, we understand that you accept the use of the cookies we have described, on the terms indicated. If you do not agree, you can configure your browser or leave the site.
cookies.s6Body: Dekorama may modify this cookie policy to adapt it to regulatory changes or changes in the cookies used. We recommend reviewing this page periodically.
cookies.s7Body: For any questions about the use of cookies, you can contact us at info@dekoramagroup.com or by phone at +34 628 571 537.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Dekorama privacy and data protection policy. Information on the processing of personal data for renovations and contact.
privacy.s1Body: Dekorama, with registered office on the Costa del Sol, Málaga, is the data controller for the personal data you provide to us through this website (dekorama.es), the contact form, email or phone.
privacy.s2Body: The personal data you provide will be used to manage requests for information and enquiries about our full renovation, kitchen, bathroom and interior design services; to send quotes and commercial communications if you have given us your consent; and to comply with any legal obligations that apply to us.
privacy.s3Body: The legal basis for processing your data is your consent when submitting the form or contacting us, the performance of a contract or pre-contract when you request a quote or service, and Dekorama's legitimate interest in responding to your enquiries and improving our services.
privacy.s4Body: We will retain your data for as long as you maintain a commercial relationship with us or until you request its deletion. In any case, applicable legal retention periods will be respected.
privacy.s5Body: We will not disclose your data to third parties except where required by law. Data may be processed by service providers acting as processors (for example, hosting or email tools), with appropriate safeguards.
privacy.s6Body: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, portability and objection by writing to info@dekoramagroup.com, stating the right you wish to exercise. You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es) if you consider that the processing does not comply with the regulations.
privacy.s7Body: We have adopted the technical and organisational measures necessary to ensure the security and integrity of your personal data and to prevent its alteration, loss or unauthorised access.
privacy.s8Body: For any questions about this privacy policy, you can contact us at info@dekoramagroup.com or by phone at +34 628 571 537.

aviso.title: Legal Notice
aviso.description: Legal notice and terms of use of the Dekorama website. Identifying details, intellectual property and applicable legislation.
aviso.s1Body: In compliance with Article 10 of Law 34/2002 of 11 July on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), we inform you that the owner of this website is Dekorama, dedicated to full renovations, interior design, kitchens and bathrooms on the Costa del Sol (Málaga). To contact us you can use the email info@dekoramagroup.com or the phone +34 628 571 537.
aviso.s2Body: This legal notice governs the use of the Dekorama website. Browsing the website confers the status of user and implies full acceptance of each and every provision included in this Legal Notice.
aviso.s3Body: The user undertakes to make appropriate use of the content and services that Dekorama offers through this website and not to use them for illegal activities or those contrary to good faith. The reproduction, distribution or public communication of the content of the site without express authorisation from the owner is prohibited.
aviso.s4Body: Dekorama owns or has the necessary licences for the intellectual and industrial property rights of the content of the website (texts, images, designs, logos, etc.). Unauthorised use constitutes a breach of applicable regulations.
aviso.s5Body: Dekorama shall not be liable for any damage that may arise from the availability or accessibility of the site, from interruptions in operation or from failures in the systems or information contained therein, or from the introduction of viruses or harmful elements by third parties.
aviso.s6Body: If the website contains links to other sites, Dekorama has no control over them and assumes no responsibility for their content. The inclusion of links does not imply any relationship with the owners of the linked sites.
aviso.s7Body: The relationship between Dekorama and the user shall be governed by current Spanish legislation. For the resolution of any dispute, the parties shall submit to the Courts and Tribunals of the user's domicile or of Málaga, at Dekorama's choice.
aviso.s8Body: For any queries regarding this Legal Notice, you may contact info@dekoramagroup.com.

reformas.title: Full Renovations on the Costa del Sol
reformas.description: Full renovations of homes and premises on the Costa del Sol. Custom design, premium materials and professional execution. Detailed and transparent quote.
reformas.intro: We completely transform your home with a tailored project, from design to final finishes. We manage all trades so you only have to worry about choosing.

caracteristicas.title: What does a full renovation with Dekorama include?
caracteristicas.item1Desc: Visualise your project before starting with realistic 3D modelling of all spaces
caracteristicas.item2Desc: We coordinate all trades: masonry, plumbing, electricity, carpentry and finishes
caracteristicas.item3Desc: We work with top brands in porcelain tiles, taps, lighting and carpentry
caracteristicas.item4Desc: We don't consider the job done until it's perfect and you're 100% satisfied

fases.title: Phases of a Full Renovation
fases.fase1Desc: We visit your home, assess the current state and take precise measurements
fases.fase2Desc: We create a complete 3D project so you can visualise the final result
fases.fase3Desc: We give you a fixed quote with no final surprises
fases.fase4Desc: We remove the existing and execute the new layout
fases.fase5Desc: We carry out plumbing, electrical and air conditioning installations
fases.fase6Desc: We apply coatings, paints and carpentry. Final review with you

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about full renovations
faq.q1: How much does a full renovation cost on the Costa del Sol?
faq.a1: It depends on size, specification and layout changes. As a broad guide, many mid-size homes fall between €40,000 and €120,000. Dekorama provides a fixed quote after a site visit and measurements.
faq.q2: How long does a full renovation take?
faq.a2: Typically 2 to 5 months depending on scope, permits and material lead times. Agreeing finishes and drawings before demolition reduces delays.
faq.q3: Do you handle permits and the residents' association?
faq.a3: Yes. We guide you on municipal licences where required and coordinate access, noise and working hours with the community.
faq.q4: Do you only work in Benalmádena?
faq.a4: No. Our showroom is in Benalmádena and we carry out projects in Marbella, Fuengirola, Estepona, Torremolinos and across the Costa del Sol.

cocinas.title: Custom Kitchens on the Costa del Sol
cocinas.description: Custom kitchen design on the Costa del Sol. Bespoke manufacturing, top brand appliances and premium finishes. Complimentary consultation.
cocinas.h1: Custom Kitchens That Adapt to You
cocinas.intro: We design and manufacture your ideal kitchen adapted to your space, style and way of cooking. From design to installation, we take care of everything.

porque.title: Why choose our kitchens?
porque.item1Desc: Every kitchen is unique. We adapt the design to your space and lifestyle
porque.item2Desc: We work with SANTOS, SILESTONE, NEOLITH and the best brands in the sector
porque.item3Desc: BOSCH, SIEMENS, NEFF... You choose the brand and we integrate it perfectly
porque.item4Desc: We guarantee materials, installation and finishes. Your satisfaction is our priority

proceso.title: Design and Manufacturing Process
proceso.paso1: Complimentary consultation in our showroom or at your home
proceso.paso3: Selection of materials, finishes and appliances

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about custom kitchens
faq.q1: How much does a custom kitchen cost on the Costa del Sol?
faq.a1: A complete kitchen with mid-range appliances often starts around €12,000 and can exceed €35,000 in high-end homes. Final price depends on size, brands and worktop choice.
faq.q2: How long from design to installation?
faq.a2: 6 to 12 weeks is typical: 1–2 weeks for design, 4–8 for manufacturing and several days on site for fitting.
faq.q3: Can I see the kitchen in 3D before it is built?
faq.a3: Yes. We use 3D design so you can approve layout, colours and appliances before production.
faq.q4: Do you install appliances and plumbing?
faq.a4: Yes. Our team coordinates plumbing, electrics and appliance fitting for a turnkey handover.

banos.title: Complete Bathrooms on the Costa del Sol
banos.description: Design and renovation of complete bathrooms on the Costa del Sol. Top brand porcelain tiles, premium taps and custom design. Detailed quote.
banos.intro: We create unique bathrooms where design and functionality meet. From minimalist bathrooms to luxury spaces with premium finishes.

porque.title: Why trust us for your bathroom?
porque.item1Desc: Over 10 years designing and renovating bathrooms on the Costa del Sol
porque.item2Desc: PORCELANOSA, MARAZZI, KERABEN, APARICI... The best collections within your reach
porque.item3Desc: GROHE, HANSGROHE, ROCA, GEBERIT... Quality that lasts decades
porque.item4Desc: Our professionals take care of every detail to the final finish

incluye.title: What does a complete bathroom include?

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about complete bathrooms
faq.q1: How much does a complete bathroom renovation cost on the Costa del Sol?
faq.a1: As a guide: roughly €5,000–€8,000 for basic refreshes, €8,000–€15,000 mid-range and above €15,000 for premium finishes. Size and moving plumbing have the biggest impact.
faq.q2: How long does a bathroom renovation take?
faq.a2: A standard bathroom usually needs 2 to 4 weeks on site when materials are confirmed and layout changes are limited.
faq.q3: Which porcelain and tap brands do you supply?
faq.a3: PORCELANOSA, MARAZZI, KERABEN, APARICI for tiles; GROHE, HANSGROHE, ROCA and GEBERIT for taps and sanitaryware.
faq.q4: Does a complete bathroom include screen, tray and furniture?
faq.a4: Yes. We can include tray or bath, shower screen, sanitaryware, taps and bespoke furniture within the agreed budget.

materiales.description: Sale of premium renovation materials in Benalmádena and the Costa del Sol. Porcelain tiles, taps, shower trays, LED lighting, shower screens and exterior materials.
materiales.intro: In our showroom you'll find the best brands of porcelain tiles, taps, sanitaryware, lighting and everything you need for your project.

categorias.porcelanicosDesc: PORCELANOSA, MARAZZI, KERABEN, APARICI, ROCA. Latest generation floors and wall coverings

materiales.visitaDesc: We advise you personally in our Benalmádena showroom. Bring your project and we'll help you choose the best materials.

materialesHub.title: Bathroom and Kitchen Materials | Dekorama Benalmádena
materialesHub.description: Discover the materials we sell in our Benalmádena store: taps, shower screens, sanitary ware, bathtubs, shower trays and porcelain tiles. Direct access to each category.

materialesHub.supportDescription: If the client only wants materials, they can visit our showroom. If they want a full solution, we combine product, design, installation and works with the same team.
materialesHub.supportCard1Text: We help choose taps, shower screens, sanitary ware, porcelain tiles and shower trays based on size, style and budget.
materialesHub.supportCard2Text: We can also install the materials and execute the complete bathroom, kitchen or home renovation.

sanitarios.description: Wall-hung toilets, floor-standing models, bidets and basins from Roca, Duravit and Villeroy & Boch for modern or classic bathrooms.

porcelanicos.title: Porcelain tiles and wall coverings

catalogo.description: Online catalogue of premium renovation materials in Benalmádena and the Costa del Sol. Porcelain tiles, taps, sanitaryware, lighting and more. Dekorama.

meta.title: B2B Partner Programme | Dekorama Group
meta.description: Join Dekorama's partner programme. Earn commissions, access a premium catalogue and get dedicated support — for architects, interior designers and contractors on the Costa del Sol.

hero.title: You refer. We supply. You earn.
hero.subtitle: No paperwork. No risk. Automatic commissions on every project your clients place.
hero.audience: Architects · Interior Designers · Contractors · Sector Professionals

why.title: Why partner with Dekorama Group
why.intro: Dekorama Group is the premium reference on the Costa del Sol for high-end projects. We work with architects and interior designers offering an exclusive selection of porcelain tiles, bathroom furniture, tapware and lighting.
why.feature1Desc: We don't just supply materials — we provide complete on-site coordination, a unique differentiator that closes larger contracts.
why.feature2Desc: An inspiration space where your clients can see and touch the materials. The tactile experience is the best sales argument.
why.feature3Desc: Guaranteed response time for every lead referred by our partners. Your reputation is ours.

benefits.title: Partner programme benefits
benefits.b1Desc: Earn automatically on every purchase your referred clients make.
benefits.b2Desc: No risk. No paperwork. Immediate access to the full catalogue.
benefits.b3Desc: Personalised support always. One direct point of contact for every project.
benefits.b4Desc: Early access to new collections before public launch.
benefits.b5Desc: Full transparency. Commission details and active projects on the 1st of every month.
benefits.b6Desc: Co-marketing and publication of your projects on Dekorama's website and social media.

tiers.title: Programme tiers
tiers.subtitle: The programme has three tiers based on the annual purchase volume of your referred clients. Benefits grow in proportion to the value you bring.
tiers.notice: Tier review is carried out every 6 months. Once a higher tier is reached, benefits activate immediately in the next billing cycle.
tiers.silverBenefits: 5% commission · Digital catalogue · WhatsApp Business support
tiers.goldBenefits: 10% commission · Dedicated advisor · Early access to new arrivals · Quarterly review
tiers.platinumBenefits: 15% commission · Co-marketing · Exclusive events · Additional client discounts · Private showroom visit

calculator.title: Calculate your estimated commission
calculator.subtitle: Enter the estimated monthly purchase volume you expect to generate to see your estimated annual commission.
calculator.label: Estimated monthly client volume (€)
calculator.disclaimer: Indicative estimate only. Actual commission is calculated on the verified monthly purchase volume.

howTo.title: How to become a partner
howTo.step1Desc: Book a 15-minute call or send us a message with your professional profile.
howTo.step2Desc: 3-step process. No bureaucracy. Immediate access to the full catalogue.
howTo.step3Desc: Your client visits the showroom or requests a quote online with your referral code.
howTo.step4Desc: Automatic report on the 1st of every month. Prompt transfer. Full transparency.

tools.title: Partner tools
tools.t1Desc: Automatic email on the 1st of each month with commission details, active projects and next-month projection.
tools.t2Desc: Quarterly sessions on new arrivals, premium market trends and practical application case studies.
tools.t3Desc: Exclusive invitations to new collection presentations before public launch.
tools.t4Desc: Publication of your projects on Dekorama's website and social media with mention of your studio or firm.

showroom.title: Bring your clients to the showroom
showroom.body: Our showroom in Benalmádena is available for private visits with your clients. Architects and interior designers who bring clients to the physical space close more projects and at higher value.
showroom.international: For international clients we also offer video call consultations.

contact.title: Ready to join the programme?
contact.subtitle: Book a 15-minute call or tell us about your profile. We respond within 2 hours.

contact.errorGeneric: Could not send. Please try again.
contact.orWhatsApp: Or write to us directly on WhatsApp

contactPage.metaDescription: Contact Dekorama for full renovations, custom kitchens and bathrooms on the Costa del Sol. Complimentary consultation. Visit our showroom in Benalmádena.
contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you as soon as possible. Visit us at our showroom or request a complimentary consultation.

marbella.title: Full Renovations Marbella | Dekorama
marbella.description: Luxury full renovations in Marbella. Kitchens, bathrooms and interior design with premium materials. Complimentary quote for your villa or apartment.
marbella.intro: Specialists in high-end renovations in Marbella and surroundings. We transform villas, apartments and commercial spaces with exclusive design and top-brand materials.
marbella.whyUs: Your trusted renovation company in Marbella
marbella.whyUsDesc: Over 10 years executing projects in Marbella, Puerto Banús, Nueva Andalucía and San Pedro Alcántara. We know the particularities of the luxury market in the area and work to the highest quality standards.
marbella.zonesDesc: Marbella Centre, Puerto Banús, Nueva Andalucía, San Pedro Alcántara, Golden Mile, Sierra Blanca, Las Chapas, Elviria and the entire east and west of Marbella.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about renovations in Marbella
faq.q1: Do you renovate luxury villas and apartments in Marbella?
faq.a1: Yes. We deliver kitchens, bathrooms and full renovations in Marbella, Puerto Banús and Nueva Andalucía with premium materials.
faq.q2: Do you offer no-obligation quotes in Marbella?
faq.a2: Yes. We visit the property, take measurements and provide a detailed quote. You can also start at our Benalmádena showroom.
faq.q3: How long does a renovation take in Marbella?
faq.a3: It depends on scope. A kitchen or bathroom may take 3–6 weeks; a full renovation often needs several months.
faq.q4: Do you coordinate trades and materials?
faq.a4: Yes. We manage masonry, installations, carpentry and supply of tiles, taps and finishes from a single point of contact.

fuengirola.title: Full Renovations Fuengirola | Dekorama
fuengirola.description: Full renovations in Fuengirola. Specialists in kitchens, bathrooms and complete apartment renovation. Free consultation and personalised quote.
fuengirola.intro: We transform your home in Fuengirola with personalised full renovations. From design to execution, we take care of everything so you only have to worry about enjoying the result.
fuengirola.whyUsDesc: We know the Fuengirola area perfectly, Los Boliches, Torreblanca and Carvajal. Extensive experience in holiday and residential apartment renovations.
fuengirola.zonesDesc: Fuengirola Centre, Los Boliches, Torreblanca, Carvajal, Reserva del Higuerón and all Fuengirola developments.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about renovations in Fuengirola
faq.q1: Do you renovate holiday rental apartments in Fuengirola?
faq.a1: Yes. We work on holiday lets and permanent homes, using durable materials and realistic build schedules.
faq.q2: How much does a full renovation cost in Fuengirola?
faq.a2: It varies by size and specification. After a site visit we provide a fixed quote with no final surprises.
faq.q3: Can I hire you for kitchens or bathrooms only?
faq.a3: Yes. You can book a custom kitchen, complete bathroom or full renovation depending on your project stage.
faq.a4: In Benalmádena (Avenida Tivoli, 17), a short drive from Fuengirola.

estepona.title: Full Renovations Estepona | Dekorama
estepona.description: Full renovations in Estepona. Custom kitchens, complete bathrooms and interior design. Premium materials and luxury finishes for your home.
estepona.intro: Quality renovation specialists in Estepona. We design and execute complete projects with premium materials and professional finishes that stand out.
estepona.whyUsDesc: Experience in all types of renovations in Estepona, from apartments to luxury villas. Personalised attention and commitment to excellence in every project.
estepona.zonesDesc: Estepona Centre, Estepona Port, Selwo, Cancelada, Villacana, El Padrón and the entire Estepona coast to Casares.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about renovations in Estepona
faq.q1: Do you renovate seafront villas in Estepona?
faq.a1: Yes. We work on villas and apartments in Estepona with finishes suited to humidity and coastal conditions.
faq.q2: Do you offer interior design as well as building work?
faq.a2: Yes. Full renovations include layout advice, material selection and trade coordination.
faq.q3: How long does a kitchen renovation take in Estepona?
faq.a3: Usually 6–10 weeks from design to installation, depending on cabinetry and appliance lead times.
faq.q4: Can I buy materials only without installation?
faq.a4: Yes. Our Benalmádena showroom sells porcelain, taps, shower trays and screens with professional advice.

torremolinos.title: Full Renovations Torremolinos | Dekorama
torremolinos.description: Full renovations in Torremolinos. Kitchens, bathrooms and complete home renovation. Detailed quote and work without surprises.
torremolinos.intro: We renovate your home in Torremolinos with full renovations from start to finish. Custom design, quality materials and guaranteed professional execution.
torremolinos.whyUs: Your best option for renovating in Torremolinos
torremolinos.whyUsDesc: Extensive knowledge of the Torremolinos area, La Carihuela, Bajondillo and Playamar. Renovations for both residents and holiday rental properties.
torremolinos.zonesDesc: Torremolinos Centre, La Carihuela, Bajondillo, Playamar, Montemar, Los Álamos and the entire Torremolinos coast.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about renovations in Torremolinos
faq.q1: Do you renovate flats and apartments in Torremolinos?
faq.a1: Yes. We work in La Carihuela, Bajondillo, Playamar and the centre, for owner-occupiers and holiday lets.
faq.q2: Does the quote include materials and labour?
faq.a2: Yes. We provide an itemised breakdown of materials, trades and timelines for clear comparison.
faq.q3: Do you handle small bathrooms and compact kitchens?
faq.a3: Yes. We optimise layout and storage in smaller coastal apartments.
faq.q4: How do I book a visit in Torremolinos?
faq.a4: Call +34 628 571 537 or use the contact form. We arrange a complimentary visit at your property.

porcelanicos.title: Porcelain Tiles Málaga | Dekorama Costa del Sol
porcelanicos.description: Sale of top-brand porcelain tiles in Málaga and Costa del Sol. PORCELANOSA, MARAZZI, KERABEN, APARICI. Showroom in Benalmádena. Professional advice.
porcelanicos.intro: Discover our wide selection of porcelain tiles for floors and walls. The best European brands at the best price, with personalised advice in our Benalmádena showroom.
porcelanicos.marcasTitle: Porcelain tile brands we work with
porcelanicos.marcasDesc: We work exclusively with the best porcelain tile brands on the market: PORCELANOSA, MARAZZI, KERABEN, APARICI, ROCA, VIVES, GRESPANIA. Guaranteed European quality.
porcelanicos.cat1Desc: Realistic finish, superior durability. Ideal for living rooms and bedrooms.
porcelanicos.cat2Desc: Marble elegance without maintenance. Perfect for bathrooms and kitchens.
porcelanicos.cat3Desc: Pieces up to 120x280cm. Minimal joints, maximum visual impact.
porcelanicos.cat4Desc: Frost and high-temperature resistant. Safe for terraces and pools.
porcelanicos.ventaja1Desc: Harder than natural marble. Does not scratch or stain.
porcelanicos.ventaja2Desc: No special treatments needed. Simple cleaning with water.
porcelanicos.ventaja3Desc: Wood, stone, cement, marble imitations. Any style is possible.
porcelanicos.showroomDesc: Come and see and touch our porcelain tiles in person. We advise you at no obligation and help you choose the best material for your project. Easy access from Málaga, Marbella, Fuengirola, Torremolinos and the entire Costa del Sol.

commonServices.service3: Complete bathrooms with premium porcelain tiles

meta.title: Link Exchange | Dekorama
meta.description: Partner with Dekorama for a contextual backlink exchange. We link to you in our renovation blog, you link back to us. Free, permanent, and topically relevant.

hero.title: Grow your authority together
hero.subtitle: We publish new renovation and interior design articles every week. We can include a contextual link to your site — and we ask for one in return.

howIt.title: How it works
howIt.step1Desc: Send us a short message with your site URL and a page you want linked to.
howIt.step2Desc: We check that your site is topically relevant and has genuine readership. No link farms.
howIt.step3Desc: We include a contextual link to your site in an upcoming blog article where it reads naturally.
howIt.step4Desc: You add a link to a relevant Dekorama page in one of your own articles. That is it — no fees, no contracts.

whoFor.title: Who is this for?
whoFor.desc: We work with sites that share a topical overlap with home renovation, interior design, or property on the Costa del Sol.
whoFor.niche2: Real estate agencies (Málaga / Costa del Sol)

rules.title: Our ground rules
rules.rule1: Links must be placed contextually inside real article content — not in footers or sidebars.
rules.rule2: No link farms, PBNs, or sites built exclusively for link exchange.
rules.rule3: Both links must be followed (dofollow). No sponsored or UGC attributes.
rules.rule4: Minimum domain age of 12 months and genuine organic traffic.
rules.rule5: One exchange per domain. We keep the network small and the links meaningful.

cta.title: Interested? Let us talk.
cta.desc: Send us your site URL and the page you want linked. We will check fit and get back to you within a few days.
